message:
fix(event-stream,ingest): fix infinite loop on bus close and UTF-8 trim edge case

event_stream.rs: FilteredEventStream::next() had an infinite loop bug.
When the broadcast channel closed (all senders dropped), recv().await
returned RecvError::Closed but the Err(_) handler just continued the
loop, calling recv() again immediately — creating a hot async loop that
never yields. Fix: distinguish Closed (return None) from Lagged
(continue receiving from new position).

ingest.rs: trim_utf8_tail_to_max_bytes() could return an empty string
when max_bytes was smaller than the multi-byte character at the trim
boundary. The UTF-8 snap-forward loop would advance past text.len(),
producing text[len..] = "". Fix: when the snapping loop exhausts all
positions, fall back to the last full character rather than returning
empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
